title: ilex scabridula
intro: Ilex scabridula, also known as the Prickly-leaved Holly, is a plant species within the Ilex genus, native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The Prickly-leaved Holly has been utilized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, derived from its leaves and berries. Consuming Ilex scabridula is believed to offer health benefits such as improved digestion and reduced fever, as well as providing antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which may be used to treat various health issues.
